name: Arjun Mehta
title: Full Stack Engineer
summary: Passionate engineer with 3 years of experience building scalable web applications. Focused on clean architecture, developer experience, and shipping products that matter.

points: Reduced payment checkout latency by 40% through API response caching and frontend optimizations.
Led migration of legacy PHP modules to Node.js microservices, improving deployment frequency by 3x.
Mentored 2 junior engineers and established team code review standards.
Built real-time transaction monitoring dashboard used by 50+ operations staff.
Integrated 4 new payment gateway providers, expanding merchant coverage.
Wrote load tests that uncovered a critical race condition before production rollout.
